reviews.review_description:
I'm a sucker for these new-age "tabletop"games. I think I am one of the few people who used to prefer board games rather than computer games in the early 80s. Fond memories of me and my whole family sitting around the coffee table playing games like Monopoly, battleship, clue etc.  unfortunately. Nowadays we all have our own busy lives to live and do not have the time to sit down and play board games together. That is where the new age of gaming comes in. This game (along with a similar game called battlenauts) is fast becoming one of my favourites. I already have most of the digital board games on the quest and other systems. Playing with like minded people online really brings back fond memories for me (and you do not have to clean up after either). Hopefully this game will go online as well. Maybe I am a bit weird preferring games like this to the traditional "headless chicken" running FPS games.
Suggestions for next update: it would be cool if they could be some kind of story to the solo player mode and to make the game more exciting at times, would be nice to have random special items that players can use (like a shield that is one use only or firing multiple canon balls or something). A random item that can be earned and used which flips the players ships to the opposing side and vise versa would also be quite amusing.

developer_response.body: Wow, thank you for the kind words! It is amazing to know that we could help bring back those childhood memories. We totally agree with you on the "headless chicken" FPS comparison - it's great to slow down sometimes. We are taking notes on your suggestions! Thanks again for supporting us and happy gaming!

reviews.review_description:
I bought this the first day it was available and gave it a try.  I giggled like a child while playing because this is so silly and fun.  It's like playing that old game Battleship but you are playing with Pirate ships instead of WW2 ship.  My wife heard me laughing and asked what I was laughing at, so I had her put on my Q3 and play.  She also sat there laughing away having fun. One game turned into another then another.  I think she played five in a row; it was so much fun. She is buying the game now so that when they have the multiplayer up and running, that we can play against each other. 

I'd like to see where you can enlarge the entire playing field to make it easier to view.  Us old people need a larger view.  It would also be cool if in the future they had a variety of different styles of ships.  WW1 and WW2 ships.   Aksi if one side is pirates, the other side would be the British Navy.

My wife and I tried the multiplayer for the first time last night.  Overall, it worked good except in two different games we played the game froze up, not allowing either of us to shoot our cannon. We could move and enlarge the table, we would move the treasure chests, but we could not get it to allow us to pull back and fire the cannon. 

It happened both times after my wife went to reach for her cannon and instead caught ahold of the table and moved it. She put it back into place, fired her cannon (missed) but my next turn would not happen. 

Also, in multiplayer you have to use the "ship arrangement" button to put the ships on the board because if you move them yourselves, your opponents can see the skeleton figures placing the boats, thus making it easy to locate and bomb them.

Was excited to get back on the game and start going against people, but to my dismay you need a stupid code to send to somebody? This is 2025 and multiplayer shouldn't be ran like this, all check back next year and see if really multiplayer support has been added.

developer_response.body: Multiplayer matchmaking is now in the game, along with the better overall experience: smoother gameplay, improved aiming and game stability!

reviews.review_title: Multiplayer not usable due to glitches
reviews.review_description:
Hi! Was playing the new multiplayer game with a friend 2000 miles away. We had to abandon both games midway through both matches due to her canon freezing and being unusable. Also, on 2nd game I was hitting a ship on her side where she did not have a ship stationed, so I was hitting a ghost ship on a blank square.
Please address these issues and I will bump up to five stars.

developer_response.body: We listened and truly did our best - we reworked the game, and multiplayer is now much more usable, along with the overall experience: smoother gameplay, improved aiming and game stability, and much more!

reviews.review_description: This is a cool game. Familiar battle ship rules with VR flair. I think there can be enhancements for seated play, it would be great if players could tilt the board upwards a little. Right now it always plays flat. Also, ship pieces sometimes block other pieces across the board. If they were transparent or at different angle that would help. And of course multi-player would be sweet. I look forward to more updates!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! We're glad you liked it. Actually, that're some great ideas, we'll see what we can do. Stay tuned!

reviews.review_description:
Ive bought this game simply to support you putting multiplayer in because I guarantee it will be a top game among friend groups.
Currently a group of four of us play the space battleships. "Battlenauts" quality game for friends who want to chill

developer_response.body: We really appreciate it. We're actively working on multiplayer, and your support means a lot to us. We're looking forward to it too!

reviews.review_description: Love this game and can't wait to play with others!! It brings me back to childhood playing with my family!! Have shared with daughters and friends!! Thank you!! 😊

developer_response.body: Whoa! We love that you love it! Thanks for sharing it with your family and friends - we really appreciate it!

reviews.review_description: I really like the direction this game is going in. I hope the developers stay interested and fill it out a bit more. Keep up the great work!

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot for your kind words! We will bring more, that's our plan for sure

reviews.review_description:
Amazing app 
 I  just downloaded this great game The graphics are really good.
 The play table could be a little larger but I'm so looking forward to updates and multi player.

Hopefully more designs for ships ww1 ww2 

You have done a great job. It's a lot of fun thank you Dev for bringing back my childhood memories.
 this reminds me of the great board game with a different name. 10 out of 10 updates soon hopefully

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot! Your words mean so much to us, we truly appreciate you taking the time to share it.
Stay tuned!

reviews.review_title: It's Battleship, the game in VR.
reviews.review_description: This is a very good version of Battleship, the game in VR (mixed Reality)tabletop mode plain and simple.

developer_response.body: We're very happy that you like it! We'll keep working to improve it even more!

reviews.review_description:
This game is an utter gem. 

So much fun, well designed and thought of. Love the trophy additions. Cannot wait to see the improvements that come with time. It’s already amazing.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for the kind words, we really appreciate it!

reviews.review_description: Hello this game is very addictive very good game play worth getting

I don’t have a quest 3 and they give you no option to play the game without mix reality .

So I’m just seeing the game in a boring black and white screen. Debating if I should refund it or not

developer_response.body: You're right – it's currently designed specifically around mixed reality to create a unique, room-scale experience. We totally understand it might feel limited if you're using a headset without full MR support. We're looking into expanding the experience with a full VR mode in the future – but we don't have an ETA right now. Hope you'll hang onto it, and thanks again for giving it a try!

reviews.review_description: I love the overall aesthetic. The ships are beautiful, especially the serpent one (the skeleton is such a nice touch). And the music is so catchy! I’ve been humming along the entire time.

developer_response.body: Your feedback means a lot to us, and we truly appreciate you taking the time to share it. Hope you continue to have fun with the game!

reviews.review_description: Great game. Looking forward to hear about future updates.
